---
title: "Custom Symbols (Restart)"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
  typst:
    output-file: "example-custom-restart-typst.pdf"
filters:
  - ../_extensions/footnote-styles/footnote-styles.lua
extensions:
  footnote-styles:
    custom: ["★", "◆", "●", "■"]
    cycle: "restart"
---

This is some text with a footnote.[^1] Here is another footnote.[^2] And a third.[^3]

A fourth footnote here.[^4] and a fifth.[^5]

Sixth,[^6] seventh,[^7] eighth,[^8] ninth,[^9] and tenth.[^10]

[^1]: First footnote; ★.
[^2]: Second footnote; ◆.
[^3]: Third footnote; ●.
[^4]: Fourth footnote; ■.
[^5]: Fifth footnote; back to ★.
[^6]: Sixth footnote; ◆.
[^7]: Seventh footnote; ●.
[^8]: Eighth footnote; ■.
[^9]: Ninth footnote; back to ★.
[^10]: Tenth footnote; ◆.
